summary: font-pairing.md fully satisfies all acceptance criteria. Both pairing approaches (contrast and concordance) are described with decision guidance. Weight hierarchy covers heading 600/700 and body 400/500 with the required 200-unit minimum delta. Four typographic scales (Minor Third, Major Third, Perfect Fourth, Golden Ratio) are provided with concrete pixel values at base 16px, exceeding the minimum of three. Ten Google Fonts combinations are listed, each self-contained with heading font, body font, pairing type, mood, recommended weights, and ready-to-use tokens.json entries. All five required moods are covered: formal (Raleway + Open Sans), modern (Inter + Lora, Poppins + Inter, Roboto + Roboto Slab), friendly (Montserrat + Merriweather, Nunito + Libre Baskerville), elegant (Playfair Display + Source Sans 3, DM Serif Display + DM Sans), technical (Space Grotesk + IBM Plex Sans). All recommended fonts are stable free Google Fonts. Font format strings match the typography.families schema from design-tokens.md using the correct fallback-stack pattern.
